Feature_Name: Inter-gNB-DU LTM Handover UE Context Setup Procedure
Feature_Description: This procedure is used for the case when the UE moves from one gNB-DU to another gNB-DU within the same gNB-CU during NR operation for LTM.
Feature_Objectives: The gNB-CU sends a UE CONTEXT SETUP REQUEST message to the candidate gNB-DU(s) for each candidate cell, containing one candidate cell ID and the CSI resource configuration for subsequent LTM.
The gNB-CU may provide the LTM configuration ID mapping list to the candidate gNB-DU(s).
The gNB-CU may request PRACH resources from the candidate gNB-DU(s).

The gNB-CU may request the candidate gNB-DU(s) to provide the lower layer configuration for the purpose of generating the reference configuration or provide the lower layer part of the reference configuration to the candidate gNB-DU(s).

If the candidate gNB-DU accepts the request of LTM configuration, it responds with a UE CONTEXT SETUP RESPONSE message including the generated lower layer RRC configurations for the accepted target candidate cell.
Feature_Implementation_Steps: The gNB-CU sends a UE CONTEXT SETUP REQUEST message to the candidate gNB-DU(s) for each candidate cell, containing one candidate cell ID and the CSI resource configuration for subsequent LTM. The gNB-CU may provide the LTM configuration ID mapping list to the candidate gNB-DU(s). The gNB-CU may request PRACH resources from the candidate gNB-DU(s). The gNB-CU may request the candidate gNB-DU(s) to provide the lower layer configuration for the purpose of generating the reference configuration or provide the lower layer part of the reference configuration to the candidate gNB-DU(s).

If the candidate gNB-DU accepts the request of LTM configuration, it responds with a UE CONTEXT SETUP RESPONSE message including the generated lower layer RRC configurations for the accepted target candidate cell.
Procedure_Implementation_Steps: The gNB-CU sends a UE CONTEXT SETUP REQUEST message to the candidate gNB-DU(s) for each candidate cell, containing one candidate cell ID and the CSI resource configuration for subsequent LTM. The gNB-CU may provide the LTM configuration ID mapping list to the candidate gNB-DU(s). The gNB-CU may request PRACH resources from the candidate gNB-DU(s). The gNB-CU may request the candidate gNB-DU(s) to provide the lower layer configuration for the purpose of generating the reference configuration or provide the lower layer part of the reference configuration to the candidate gNB-DU(s).

If the candidate gNB-DU accepts the request of LTM configuration, it responds with a UE CONTEXT SETUP RESPONSE message including the generated lower layer RRC configurations for the accepted target candidate cell.

Information_Elements.IE_Definition: The UE CONTEXT SETUP REQUEST message is sent from the gNB-CU to the candidate gNB-DU to create a UE context and setup one or more data bearers. For Inter-gNB-DU LTM, it contains information for each candidate cell, including a candidate cell ID, CSI resource configuration for subsequent LTM, optionally an LTM configuration ID mapping list, optionally a request for PRACH resources, and optionally a request for or provision of the lower layer configuration for generating the reference configuration.

The UE CONTEXT SETUP RESPONSE message is sent from the candidate gNB-DU to the gNB-CU in response to a UE CONTEXT SETUP REQUEST. For Inter-gNB-DU LTM, it includes the generated lower layer RRC configurations for the accepted target candidate cell.
An identifier for a candidate cell, included in the UE CONTEXT SETUP REQUEST message for LTM configuration.
Configuration information for Channel State Information (CSI) resources, specifically for subsequent LTM, included in the UE CONTEXT SETUP REQUEST message.
A list of mappings for LTM configuration IDs, which may be provided by the gNB-CU to the candidate gNB-DU in the UE CONTEXT SETUP REQUEST message.
A request for Physical Random Access Channel (PRACH) resources, which may be included by the gNB-CU in the UE CONTEXT SETUP REQUEST message.

A request for the candidate gNB-DU to provide the lower layer configuration for generating the reference configuration, or the provision of the lower layer part of the reference configuration by the gNB-CU, for LTM purposes, included in the UE CONTEXT SETUP REQUEST message.
The generated lower layer RRC configurations for the accepted target candidate cell, included in the UE CONTEXT SETUP RESPONSE message for LTM.

Piggy_Backed_IES_Info: Not applicable for the scoped messages in this procedure.
